tl.extend variants.description: Register custom variants for the compiler.

tl.defineTokens.description: Define design tokens for a project-wide palette.

tl.createTheme.description: Define a theme override (applied via the returned class).

_dark variant block.description: Add a dark-mode override block to the surrounding rule.

_hover variant block.description: Add a hover-state override block to the surrounding rule.

Disable auto-rtl on this group.description: Opt this group out of auto-RTL property rewrites.

Disable auto-dark on this group.description: Opt this group out of auto-derived dark variants.

tl.cssVar (typed token reference).description: Reference a design-token CSS variable, type-checked at compile time.
